evals.prompt: Dry-run upload ./dist/feishu-docs-vscode to account academic-user as public skill capability feishu skill-name feishu-docs-vscode.
evals.expected_output: A dry-run report targeting academic-user/OpenSkill at feishu/feishu-docs-vscode with no push and no credential persistence.

evals.prompt: Dry-run upload ./dist/private-skill to account academic-user as private skill skill-name private-skill.
evals.expected_output: A dry-run report targeting academic-user/CloseSkill at private-skill with no push and no public repo assumptions.
